name:
top of an oak.
To the East I see a meadow, beyond that a lake.
description:
I'm in a top of an oak.
To the East I see a meadow, beyond that a lake.
hints: This is a scenic viewpoint. You can see the meadow and lake from here.
Go DOWN to return to the forest. The view gives you a sense of the map layout: meadow is east, lake beyond that.
notes: Oak treetop reached by CLIMB TREE in the forest (room 11). Provides a scenic overview - meadow to the east, lake beyond. No items. DOWN returns to the forest. Also used as a respawn point from Limbo.
